zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan於大約1310年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利時，他的父親Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr41歲，母親Gwenillian ferch Cydifor46歲。他與Meddefus verch Gruffudd在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾結婚。他於1330年住在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾。他去世於1364年在威爾士卡馬特史爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan于大约1310年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利时，他的父亲Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr41岁，母亲Gwenillian ferch Cydifor46岁。他与Meddefus verch Gruffudd在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾结婚。他于1330年住在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾。他去世于1364年在威尔士卡馬特史爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Dwnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ancient byname meaning either ‘brown’ or ‘chief, noble’, in use from the earliest times until the 19th century.

variants.name: Don
meanings: Short form of   Donald .  It is also a variant of the Irish name Donn .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan was born about 1310, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, was 41 and his mother, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, was 46. He married Meddefus verch Gruffudd in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He lived in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom in 1330. He died in 1364, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan est né environ 1310, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Meddefus verch Gruffudd à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a vécu à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni en 1330. Il est décédé en 1364, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan um 1310 in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr 41 und seine Mutter Gwenillian ferch Cydifor 46. Er hat in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Meddefus verch Gruffudd geheiratet. 1330 hat er in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1364 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan è nato il circa 1310 nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Meddefus verch Gruffudd nel Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Vissuto a Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito nel 1330. Morì nel 1364, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwganが約1310年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで生まれた時，父Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawrは41歳，母Gwenillian ferch Cydiforは46歳であった。イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンでMeddefus verch Gruffuddと結婚した。彼は1330年にはイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンに住んでいた。彼は1364年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan(이)가 대략 1310년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenillian ferch Cydifor(은)는 46세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 Meddefus verch Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 1330년도에 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 살았다. 그는 1364년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Meddefus verch Gruffudd em Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele viveu em Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom em 1330. Ele faleceu em 1364, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan родился около 1310 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Meddefus verch Gruffudd в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он жил в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в 1330 году. Он умер в 1364 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan nació aproximadamente 1310, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Meddefus verch Gruffudd en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Vivió en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido en 1330. Murió en 1364, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 55 años.
